task_intents: moving items to a higher priority
example_tasks: Upload final project assets to server
Push code changes to production branch
Move high-priority tasks to top of list
Send client feedback to design team
Upgrade server firmware to latest version
Upload raw footage to cloud storage
Promote junior developer to lead role
Export contact list for email campaign
Upload backup files to offsite storage
reasoning: The icon is a standard UI metaphor for 'upload' or 'move up'. While useful for specific technical or administrative tasks, it is too abstract for general task management and can be easily confused with navigation controls.
